# SEC Eyes $1B Crypto ETF Market Amid Rule Review

*MarketFlock Lead Analyst | May 21, 2026*

---

## 🎯 The Intelligence Signal
Bitwise, Roundhill Investments and GraniteShares had their prediction market ETF applications put on hold by the SEC earlier this month.

## ⚡ Why This Matters (The Macro View)
While most outlets report the 'what', our intelligence engine focuses on the 'why'. This development in Crypto isn't just a news item; it's a structural pivot. 

## ⚖️ The Contrarian Perspective

# Rupee Surges 1.2% on RBI Intervention

*MarketFlock Lead Analyst | May 21, 2026*

---

## 🎯 The Intelligence Signal
India’s rupee advanced the most in Asia after the central bank intervened and as policymakers are said to be considering options, including an interest-rate hike, to defend the currency.
